---
title: "Mpact Transgender Day of Visibility (TDOV) 2020"
authors:
  - admin
date: "2020-03-25"
slug: mpact-tdov
summary: "Applying a Facebook filter to support the Mpact of Las Cruces TDOV 2020 community campaign."
categories:
  - Community
  - Service
tags:
- service
- lgbtq
- transgender
image:
  caption: "Picture courtesy of Mpact of Las Cruces"
  focal_point: ""
  preview_only: true
output: blogdown::html_page
---

![](/post/mpact-tdov/mpact-tdov-featured.jpg)

Here is how you can participate in [#MpactTDOV](https://www.facebook.com/search/top/?q=%23MpactTDOV&epa=SEARCH_BOX), a community campaign to support transgender people in Las Cruces.

Simply create a Facebook profile photo using one of our photo frame filters, designed by the one and only, [Bri Nicole](https://www.facebook.com/brieanna.wells1).

# Step 1
___
First, go to our [discussion page](https://www.facebook.com/events/211064573428108/?active_tab=discussion).

Scroll down until you find a Facebook frame that you like, such as being [trans and proud](https://www.facebook.com/MpactLasCruces/posts/2940596986002752?__tn__=C-R), a [proud ally parent](https://www.facebook.com/MpactLasCruces/posts/2940624339333350?__tn__=C-R), or a [proud ally mom](https://www.facebook.com/MpactLasCruces/posts/2940645922664525?__tn__=C-R).

When you find one that you like, click the **Try It** button.

![](/post/mpact-tdov/mpact-tdov-1.png)

# Step 2
___
Next, make any adjusts to your photo.

When you are satisfied, click **Use as Profile Photo**.

![](/post/mpact-tdov/mpact-tdov-2.png)

# Step 3
___
Return to your profile page and edit your profile photo.

![](/post/mpact-tdov/mpact-tdov-3.png)

Add #MpactTDOV to the photo description and say that you are at Mpact of Las Cruces.

![](/post/mpact-tdov/mpact-tdov-4.png)

# Celebrate!
___
Thank you for helping [Mpact of Las Cruces](https://www.facebook.com/MpactLasCruces/) to create a safe, supportive space for transgender equality.

If your profile profile photo looks this this, then we can easily find and share your support on the national Transgender Day of Visiblity.

![](/post/mpact-tdov/mpact-tdov-5.png)
